report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: PayFi & Crypto Payments Guide 2026 (intermediate, ~3100 words) and Yield Farming & DeFi Strategies Guide 2026 (intermediate, ~3000 words), with full SEO metadata, JSON-LD schemas, and data page entries.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Stripe launched Tempo blockchain mainnet in March 2026 — handles 100K+ TPS with sub-second finality, co-developed with Paradigm
Stripe acquired Bridge for $1.1B; Visa and Bridge rolling out stablecoin-linked cards to 100+ countries by end of 2026
Tempo introduced Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) enabling AI agents to make autonomous payments; Stripe, Visa, and Lightspark adopted the standard
Stripe Open Issuance allows companies to issue their own stablecoins and share reserve yields
Circle launched Arc enterprise blockchain, Nanopayments in Q1 2026, and USDC Cross-Chain Gateway
Mastercard acquired stablecoin startup BVNK for $1.8B
Pendle Finance settled $69.8B in yield, TVL grew from $3.5B to $8.9B across 11 chains
DeFi yield farming matured: stablecoin strategies 4-12% APY, blue-chip pairs 10-30%, conservative vaults 5-15%
Beefy Finance, Yearn, Convex provide auto-compounding across dozens of protocols
Cross-chain farming expanding to Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Solana, BNB Chain

sections.title: Content Created
items: PayFi & Crypto Payments Guide 2026: 8 sections covering Stripe Tempo, Circle Arc, Visa stablecoin cards, AI agent payments, comparison table, risks
Yield Farming & DeFi Strategies Guide 2026: 8 sections covering Pendle yield tokenization, Beefy/Yearn vaults, Curve stablecoin yields, cross-chain farming, risk management

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: PayFi Guide: target keyword 'payfi crypto payments guide 2026', Article + FAQPage schemas, 6 FAQs, 4 internal links
Yield Farming Guide: target keyword 'yield farming defi strategies guide 2026', Article + FAQPage schemas, 6 FAQs, 4 internal links
Data page entries created in learn-20260402-v2.ts with full PageData
